scripts.test: npm run test:recommendations && npm run test:practice-audio-fallback && npm run test:practice-answer && npm run test:practice-input-flow && npm run test:haptics && npm run test:reveal-shortcut && npm run test:spelling-pattern-hints && npm run test:audio-generation && npm run test:admin-audio-queue-bulk && npm run test:word-list-sharing && npm run test:custom-lists
